# Copilot Instructions — CobbledOn Modpack

## What This Is

A [packwiz](https://packwiz.infra.link/) modpack called **CobbledOn** for Minecraft 1.21.1 on Fabric 0.18.4. The central mod is [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) (Pokémon in Minecraft). Mods are sourced from Modrinth.

## Project Structure

- `pack.toml` — Pack metadata (name, version, Minecraft/Fabric versions). The version here is the pack version.
- `index.toml` — Manifest of all mod metafiles with integrity hashes. Regenerated by packwiz.
- `mods/*.pw.toml` — One file per mod. Contains mod name, filename, download URL, hashes, side (`client`/`server`/`both`), and Modrinth update metadata.
- `*.mrpack` — Exported Modrinth modpack archives (not managed by packwiz directly).

## packwiz Commands

```bash
# Add a mod from Modrinth
packwiz modrinth install <mod-slug>

# Remove a mod
packwiz remove <mod-name>

# Update all mods to latest compatible versions
packwiz update --all

# Update a single mod
packwiz update <mod-name>

# Refresh index.toml after manual edits
packwiz refresh

# Export as .mrpack for distribution
packwiz modrinth export
```

**Never hand-edit `index.toml`** — it is generated by `packwiz refresh`. Edit `pack.toml` or individual `mods/*.pw.toml` files instead, then run `packwiz refresh`.

## Mod Metafile Format (`mods/*.pw.toml`)

```toml
name = "Mod Name"
filename = "mod-file-1.0.0+mc1.21.1.jar"
side = "both"           # "client", "server", or "both"

[download]
url = "https://cdn.modrinth.com/..."
hash-format = "sha512"
hash = "..."

[update]
[update.modrinth]
mod-id = "XXXXXXXX"     # Modrinth project ID
version = "XXXXXXXX"    # Modrinth version ID
```

## Conventions

- **Version bumps**: Update the `version` field in `pack.toml` when changing the mod list.
- **Side annotations**: Respect the `side` field — client-only mods (like Sodium) must stay `side = "client"`.
- **mrpack archives**: The `.mrpack` files in the repo root are release snapshots. Name them `CobbledOn-<version>.mrpack`.
